context: Tests whether the agent applies grill-me conventions when producing a strategy grilling document: provides a recommended answer for every question, walks each branch of the design tree, and covers the strategy comprehensively rather than stopping at surface questions.

checklist.name: Recommended answer per question
checklist.description: Every numbered question in grill-session.md is immediately followed by a recommended answer from the agent (not just a question list)

checklist.name: Pricing branch explored
checklist.description: grill-session.md contains at least one question examining the pricing decision ($49/month, monthly billing, no annual discount)

checklist.name: Distribution branch explored
checklist.description: grill-session.md contains at least one question challenging the sales-only distribution strategy or trade show reliance

checklist.name: Word of mouth assumption challenged
checklist.description: grill-session.md contains at least one question challenging the 40% word-of-mouth growth assumption

checklist.name: Competitive response branch explored
checklist.description: grill-session.md contains at least one question about the missing competitive response model

checklist.name: Team gap branch explored
checklist.description: grill-session.md contains at least one question about the missing sales/marketing expertise on the founding team

checklist.name: Minimum 8 questions
checklist.description: grill-session.md contains at least 8 distinct numbered questions (relentless coverage, not a brief skim)

checklist.name: Dependency ordering
checklist.description: Questions that depend on each other are ordered logically — e.g. pricing questions come before customer acquisition math that assumes the price

checklist.name: Non-code content only
checklist.description: grill-session.md does NOT reference any codebase, implementation details, or suggest reading code to answer the questions

checklist.name: Questions are distinct
checklist.description: Each numbered question targets a different aspect of the strategy (no two questions ask essentially the same thing)
